Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

CROSS DEFENDANT PEOPLE'S RADIO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend causes of action 1, 2, 4 and 5, if cross-complainant can plead standing in good faith. Overruled as to cause of action 3. Moving party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Rhonda Fung CSR # 4819 (301/PJB)
